stemHtml: Is there any case where a CAT Operator may operate within the constraints of the MMEL instead of using an MEL?

options.a: Yes, if this arrangement is approved by the competent authority.
options.b: No, the MMEL is never approved by the competent authorities since all operators must create their own MEL.
options.c: Yes, the operator can choose to use the MMEL instead of the MEL if it suits their needs better.
options.d: No, as the MMEL is written based on the MEL.
